form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at Shepparton over 450m (25.69) beating Miss Hoover in T3 RSTW on April 10. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on his best form.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 8 length seventh at Shepparton (25.82) in a Grade 4/5. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 8 length seventh at Shepparton (25.82) in a Grade 4/5. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 450m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 450m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Can't make much of a case this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.75 lengths fourth (19.88) over 350m at Healesville. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 500m at this track. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th over 545m at Ballarat beaten 5.5 lengths (31.57) behind Doongalla Serena in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 500m at this track behind Les Norton beaten 7 lengths (29.45). Racing well and has to be included.
